attributes.description:
By default, form controls are associated with the nearest containing `<form>` element.
This attribute allows you to place the form control outside of a form
and associate it with the form that has this `id`.
The form must be in the same document or shadow root for this to work.
attributes.name: form

attributes.description: The range's help text. If you need to display HTML, use the help-text slot instead.
attributes.name: help-text

attributes.description: The range's label. If you need to display HTML, use the `label` slot instead.
attributes.name: label

attributes.description: The maximum acceptable value of the range.
attributes.name: max

attributes.description: The minimum acceptable value of the range.
attributes.name: min

attributes.description: The name of the range, submitted as a name/value pair with form data.
attributes.name: name

attributes.description: Sets the range to a readonly state.
attributes.name: readonly

attributes.description:
Set to true to restrict the movement of a thumb to its next and previous thumb.
This only affects multi range components
attributes.name: restrict-movement

attributes.description: The interval at which the range will increase and decrease.
attributes.name: step

attributes.description: The preferred placement of the range's tooltip. Use "none" to disable the tooltip
attributes.name: tooltip-placement

attributes.description: The current values of the input (in ascending order) as a string of space separated values
attributes.name: value

cssParts.description: The form control that wraps the label, input, and help text.
cssParts.name: form-control

cssParts.description: The container that wraps the input track and ticks.
cssParts.name: input-wrapper

cssParts.description: The container that wraps the prefix.
cssParts.name: prefix

cssParts.description: The container that wraps the suffix.
cssParts.name: suffix

cssParts.description: The thumb(s) that the user can drag to change the range.
cssParts.name: thumb

cssParts.description: The container that wraps the tick marks.
cssParts.name: ticks

events.description: Emitted when the control loses focus.
events.name: syn-blur

events.description: Emitted when an alteration to the control's value is committed by the user.
events.name: syn-change

events.description: Emitted when the control gains focus.
events.name: syn-focus

events.description: Emitted when the control receives input.
events.name: syn-input

events.description: Emitted when the form control has been checked for validity and its constraints aren't satisfied.
events.name: syn-invalid

events.description: Emitted when the user moves a thumb, either via touch or keyboard. Use `Event.preventDefault()` to prevent movement.
events.name: syn-move

methods.description:
Checks for validity but does not show a validation message.
Returns `true` when valid and `false` when invalid.
methods.name: checkValidity

methods.description: Gets the associated form, if one exists.
methods.name: getForm

methods.description: Checks for validity and shows the browser's validation message if the control is invalid.
methods.name: reportValidity

methods.description: Sets a custom validation message. Pass an empty string to restore validity.
methods.name: setCustomValidity

properties.description: The default value of the form control. Primarily used for resetting the form control.
properties.name: defaultValue

properties.description:
By default, form controls are associated with the nearest containing `<form>` element.
This attribute allows you to place the form control outside of a form
and associate it with the form that has this `id`.
The form must be in the same document or shadow root for this to work.
properties.name: form

properties.description: The range's help text. If you need to display HTML, use the help-text slot instead.
properties.name: helpText

properties.description: The range's label. If you need to display HTML, use the `label` slot instead.
properties.name: label

properties.description: The maximum acceptable value of the range.
properties.name: max

properties.description: The minimum acceptable value of the range.
properties.name: min

properties.description: The name of the range, submitted as a name/value pair with form data.
properties.name: name

properties.description: Sets the range to a readonly state.
properties.name: readonly

properties.description:
Set to true to restrict the movement of a thumb to its next and previous thumb.
This only affects multi range components
properties.name: restrictMovement

properties.description: The interval at which the range will increase and decrease.
properties.name: step

properties.description:
A function used to format the tooltip's value.
The value of the thumb is passed as the only argument.
The function should return a string to display in the tooltip.
properties.name: tooltipFormatter

properties.description: The preferred placement of the range's tooltip. Use "none" to disable the tooltip
properties.name: tooltipPlacement

properties.description: The current values of the input (in ascending order) as a string of space separated values
properties.name: value

properties.description: Gets or sets the current values of the range as an array of numbers
properties.name: valueAsArray

slots.description: The range's label. Alternatively, you can use the `label` attribute.
slots.name: label

slots.description: Used to prepend a presentational icon or similar element to the range.
slots.name: prefix

slots.description: Used to append a presentational icon or similar element to the range.
slots.name: suffix

slots.description: Text that describes how to use the range. Alternatively, you can use the `help-text` attribute.
slots.name: help-text

slots.description: Used to display tick marks at specific intervals along the range.
slots.name: ticks

summary: Ranges allow the user to select values within a given range using one or two thumbs.
